description: You are a mixing engineer preparing a multitrack session for a mix. The Ardour session currently contains 6 audio tracks (Kick, Snare, HiHat, Bass, Guitar, Vocals). Organize these into submix buses by creating three new audio buses named 'Drum Bus', 'Music Bus', and 'Vocal Bus'. Route the Kick, Snare, and HiHat tracks to the 'Drum Bus', the Bass and Guitar tracks to the 'Music Bus', and the Vocals track to the 'Vocal Bus'. Ensure all three buses are routed to the Master bus and that the original tracks are no longer routed directly to Master. Set the fader gains to -3 dB for the 'Drum Bus', -2 dB for the 'Music Bus', and 0 dB for the 'Vocal Bus'. Save the session when complete. A reference spec sheet is available at ~/Audio/routing_spec.txt.
